message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "顧客" as customer
participant ":入力画面" as inputScreen
participant ":貸出コントローラ" as loanController

customer -> inputScreen : 1 データ入力
activate inputScreen

opt [ログイン成功]
  inputScreen -> loanController : 10 通常貸出()
  activate loanController
  loanController --> inputScreen : 11 貸出明細情報()
  deactivate loanController
end

deactivate inputScreen
@enduml
